subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Hannen, spoken on 1909-02-23
subcodes.first_line: There are two meanings to this narrative [of Cain and Abel]--the material and the spiritual. As to the former the occurrence is correctly stated
subcodes.subjects: @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @power of the mind over nature, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @symbolism
